steps.title: Link claim to example
steps.content: The first sentence says industrial activity is not always a threat to wildlife. The underlined phrase Consider the silver-studded blue butterfly introduces a specific case that supports that general claim.

steps.title: Reject wrong functions
steps.content: Choice A says the phrase challenges an assumption about the species itself, which the text does not do. Choice C adds a call for future studies, and Choice D claims a definition is being provided. The phrase introduces a supporting example. The answer is B.
